caption: A presentation slide titled "Data Challenges" is displayed, focusing on "Distributed Environments: e.g: Kubernetes". The slide features a technical diagram showing a "Master" node on the left, connected to a grid of worker nodes labeled "Node 1", "Node 2", "Node 3", and "Node N". Each worker node contains a box divided into four sections labeled "Pod 1", "Pod 2", "Pod 3", and "Pod N". Small blue gear-like icons are positioned at the bottom right of each worker node. In the upper right corner of the screen, a small video inset shows a woman with dark hair wearing a pink shirt. Throughout the sequence, the slide content remains static, and the woman in the inset remains in a similar position, though her facial expression and posture shift slightly as she speaks.
